name: Reflex Cat Treats - Lick Snack, Poultry + Liver & Salmon (6 x 15g) 90g
shortDescription: Reflex Cat Treats – Lick Snack , choose from Poultry, Liver & Biotin or Salmon & Inulin. Both are extremely satisfying liquid snacks for your cat. Pack of 6 snacks.
description: Reflex Cat Treats - Lick Snack , choose from Poultry, Liver & Biotin or Salmon & Inulin. Both are extremely satisfying liquid snacks for your cat. Reward good behaviour with these fun and delicious treats made with the highest quality ingredients and bursting with flavour. Pack of 6 snacks. INGREDIENTS: Poultry, Liver & Biotin: Meat and animal derivatives (4% poultry, 4% liver), milk and dairy products, biotin (20 ?g). Salmon & Inulin: Meat and animal derivatives, fish and fish derivatives (4% salmon), milk and dairy products, inulin (0.1%) NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Crude Protein (%) - 20 Oil Content (%) - 0.3 Crude Ash (%) - 3 Crude Fiber (%) - 1 FEEDING RECOMMENDATIONS: As a snack in addition to meals. Use a spoon or bowl. This product does not replace your cat's daily food requirement. Serve at room temperature.
